mapper.sql: select n.network_id as networkId, n.network_code as networkCode, n.network_name as networkName, n.resource_type as resourceType, n.resource_status as resourceStatus, n.security_status as securityStatus, n.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, n.owner_name as ownerName, n.ip_segment as ipSegment, n.ip_count as ipCount, n.vlan_no as vlanNo, n.bandwidth_mbps as bandwidthMbps, n.device_name as deviceName, n.device_type as deviceType, n.rule_summary as ruleSummary, n.access_policy as accessPolicy, n.topology_doc as topologyDoc, n.allocation_doc as allocationDoc, n.monitor_summary as monitorSummary, n.create_by as createBy, n.create_time as createTime, n.update_by as updateBy, n.update_time as updateTime, n.remark from inf_network_resource n left join inf_project p on n.project_id = p.project_id
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_network_resource where network_id in
#{networkId}
